recommendations.title: Losing It
recommendations.overview: Roman loves Camille as much as he loves his two daughters. But he is hiding from all of them a serious problem of addiction, which could endanger his dearest. Does love have a chance to survive when trust is broken?

recommendations.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
recommendations.overview: When his love interest doesn't show up for a meeting, a man and his friends go to Goa in order to find her, where they discover she loves someone else.

recommendations.title: You Can Count on Me
recommendations.overview: A single mother's life is thrown into turmoil after her struggling, rarely-seen younger brother returns to town.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Thing
recommendations.overview: During a long, hot summer on the Thamesmead Estate in Southeast London, three teenagers edge towards adulthood.

recommendations.title: Handling the Undead
recommendations.overview: On a hot summer day in Oslo, the dead mysteriously awaken, and three families are thrown into chaos when their deceased loved ones come back to them. Who are they, and what do they want?

recommendations.title: Asuran
recommendations.overview: A family from the underprivileged class is on the run after the teenaged son kills a rich man from the upper caste. Can the pacifist father be able to save his hot-blooded son?

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: A Fantastic Woman
recommendations.overview: Marina's life is thrown into turmoil following the death of her partner. Mourning the loss of the man she loved, she finds herself under intense scrutiny from those with no regard for her privacy.

recommendations.title: A Simple Twist of Fate
recommendations.overview: When Michael McCann is thrown over by the woman he loves, he becomes something of a misanthrope and a miser, spending all of his spare money on collectible gold coins. Living in the same town is an affluent family with two sons: John and Tanny. Tanny

recommendations.title: Lifechanger
recommendations.overview: A murderous shapeshifter sets out on a blood-soaked mission to make things right with the woman he loves.
